## Attribution

We maintain a [CONTRIBUTORS.md](../CONTRIBUTORS.md) to credit people who
contribute to this project. Let us know how you'd like to be credited:

- [ ] Credit me by my **GitHub handle** (@username)
- [ ] Credit me by **name**: <!-- your preferred name -->
- [ ] I'd prefer **not** to be listed

## Checklist

- [ ] Platform details and methodology sections are filled in
- [ ] Each tested check has Status, Observation, and Evidence filled in
- [ ] Platform-level vs. model-level distinction is noted where possible
- [ ] Fallback behavior is noted where applicable
- [ ] If AI was used to draft content, I've validated all claims against my actual observations
